claim: Paige Ostroushko was arrested for assaulting reporter Savanah Hernandez during an anti-ICE protest, with videos showing the incident and charges to be filed.

sub_questions.question: Who are Savanah Hernandez and Paige Ostroushko, and what are their roles in this context?
Was Savanah Hernandez assaulted during an anti-ICE protest?
Was Paige Ostroushko arrested for assaulting Savanah Hernandez?
Are there videos purportedly showing the incident?
